summary: Iteration 6 - Ingredient Fuzzy Search Feature Testing. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). All fuzzy search API endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Unable to fully test due to preview environment 403 errors on module loading, but code review confirms implementation is correct.

integration_issues.issue: Preview environment returning 403 errors for dynamically imported modules (e.g., /client/modules/Culinary/index.tsx). This is an infrastructure/deployment issue, not a code issue.

action_items: Investigate preview environment 403 errors for dynamically imported modules - may be rate limiting or caching issue
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/ordering/search-ingredients endpoint correctly implemented with case-insensitive regex matching
Frontend IngredientsGrid.tsx correctly implements fuzzy search with 150ms debounce
Dropdown shows name, stock level, category, and unit cost for each result
Selection auto-fills ingredient name, unit, and cost fields
Keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape) correctly implemented
Outside click handler closes dropdown correctly

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test due to 403 errors, code review confirms correct implementation

seed_data_creation: None - using existing inventory data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fuzzy search API fully tested and working. Frontend implementation reviewed and correct. Preview environment had intermittent 403 errors during testing. The Culinary module opens via sidebar or by dispatching CustomEvent('open-panel', { detail: { id: 'culinary' } }). Recipe editor with IngredientsGrid is accessed by clicking 'Open' on a recipe card. The ingredient input has data-testid='ingredient-input-{index}' and dropdown has data-testid='ingredient-dropdown-{index}'.

fuzzy_search.search_sal_returns_salmon_and_butter: PASS - Returns Atlantic Salmon Fillet and Unsalted Butter
fuzzy_search.search_empty_returns_all_up_to_limit: PASS - Returns all ingredients up to limit 10
fuzzy_search.search_case_insensitive: PASS - salmon, SALMON, SaLmOn all return same results
fuzzy_search.search_no_results: PASS - Non-matching query returns empty results
fuzzy_search.search_result_has_autocomplete_fields: PASS - Results have id, name, current_stock, unit, unit_cost
fuzzy_search.search_special_characters_escaped: PASS - Special regex characters properly escaped

previous_apis_still_work.on_hand_endpoint: PASS - Returns inventory items with stock levels
previous_apis_still_work.stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns inventory and purchasing stats

frontend_code_review.fuzzy_search_implementation: CORRECT - doFuzzySearch fetches from /api/ordering/search-ingredients with debounce
frontend_code_review.dropdown_rendering: CORRECT - Shows when fuzzyActiveRow matches and results exist
frontend_code_review.selection_auto_fill: CORRECT - selectFuzzyItem fills name, unit, and cost
frontend_code_review.keyboard_navigation: CORRECT - ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape handlers implemented

mocked_apis_list: /api/tts/speak - Returns audio: null, message: TTS not configured
